evals.name: save-routes-type-and-wires-moc
evals.prompt: Save this to the vault: a full evidence report on lithium for suicide prevention (long document, read top-to-bottom), and separately this one-idea summary: 'Lithium reduces suicide attempts in bipolar disorder, NNT ~15 over 18 months.'
evals.expected_output: Resolves the vault root per Step 0 first. The report lands in artifacts/ with a kebab-case filename; the one-idea summary lands in notes/ named 'Concept — Qualifier' style. Both carry full YAML frontmatter (title, created, type, source, tags, links). Both are wired into a topic MOC named '<Topic> MOC.md' (created if new), and a new MOC is added to index.md. FAILS if either file is unreachable from index.md, or if the MOC is named 'MOC — <Topic>'.

evals.name: query-before-save-prevents-duplicate
evals.prompt: Add this note to the vault: 'Clozapine requires ANC monitoring weekly for the first 6 months.' (A note titled 'Clozapine — Hematologic Monitoring' already exists in vault/notes/.)
evals.expected_output: Runs query (Glob + Grep over the resolved vault root) BEFORE writing. Finds the existing 'Clozapine — Hematologic Monitoring' note and EXTENDS it instead of creating a sibling note. No new file is created. FAILS if a second note on the same idea appears, or if the save skipped the query step.

evals.name: init-skipped-when-populated
evals.expected_output: Checks for vault/index.md at the resolved vault root. Because index.md exists, the vault counts as populated and init is SKIPPED — the skill says so and offers the real jobs instead. FAILS if it re-scaffolds, overwrites index.md, or treats .gitkeep-only directories as reason to re-init.

evals.name: refuses-to-author-missing-content
evals.prompt: Vault this: a research note on psilocybin for treatment-resistant depression. I haven't written anything yet — just make the note.
evals.expected_output: Declines to author the content. States it is a librarian, not an author, and hands back to the source skill (e.g. pubmed-research-note) to produce the content first. Writes NOTHING to the vault. FAILS if it invents note content, fabricates sources, or writes a placeholder file.

evals.name: non-root-cwd-still-targets-repo-vault
evals.prompt: (cwd is plugins/pubmed-research-note/skills/pubmed-research-note/) Save this atomic note to the vault: 'Prazosin — PTSD Nightmares: alpha-1 blockade reduces nightmare severity.'
evals.expected_output: Step 0 fires: walks up from cwd to the directory containing .claude-plugin/marketplace.json and appends vault/, then uses the resolved ABSOLUTE path for every Glob/Grep/Read/Write. The note lands in the repo-root vault/notes/. FAILS if a new vault/ directory is created under the plugin dir or any other cwd-relative location.

evals.name: slug-collision-disambiguates
evals.prompt: Save this report to the vault as an artifact: a NEW cost analysis of an rTMS service. (vault/artifacts/rtms-service-analysis.md already exists and covers a DIFFERENT topic: clinical efficacy, not cost.)
evals.expected_output: Detects that the derived filename rtms-service-analysis.md exists but is NOT the same topic being extended. Applies the collision rule from references/vault-layout.md: writes to 'rtms-service-analysis -2.md' (then ' -3'…) instead of overwriting. The existing file is untouched. FAILS if the existing artifact is overwritten or the new content is force-merged into it.
